intended_use: Indications for use of Ultrasound Workspace are quantification and reporting of cardiovascular, fetal, and abdominal structures and function of patients with suspected disease to support the physician
intended_use_full: Indications for use of Ultrasound Workspace are quantification and reporting of cardiovascular, fetal, and abdominal structures and function of patients with suspected disease to support the physician in the diagnosis.
target_condition: Left ventricular dysfunction, tricuspid valve disease, mitral regurgitation
ground_truth: For 3D Auto TV: reference software (4D CARDIO-VIEW). For 3D Auto CFQ: cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMR) as gold standard for regurgitation volume; manual PISA methodology for peak flow rate.
other_metrics: For 3D Auto TV: high agreement in measurement outputs compared to reference 4D CARDIO-VIEW on same patients (REF #4). For 3D Auto CFQ: agreement with cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMR) within predefined limits of agreement; very high correlation of peak flow rate to manual PISA method.
